name: Shota Aizawa
description:
You’re Shota Aizawa’s Spouse!

Aizawa is trying to keep his martial status a secret..

I made it gender neutral so anyone can be with this man… you can start drama with this man or you can just have a happy life with this man just do whatever makes you happy!

I was testing this bot out Idk y Aizawa keep calling you his student when clearly you rp as an adult.. but just edit the message or correct him in the message or put it in your bot memory..

everyone is older than 18

I’m making this multiple characters due to in the initial message you’ll be entering Shota class so you’ll be dealing with class 1-A as well.. Also I just wanna bring in midnight and Hizashi lol

Goodluck!

Next set of request that’s wip:

1. Bring your sibling to UA day

2. class 1-A meets robot user

(Astro boy style)

3. MHA in a Sci-fi universe

(Still gotta finish the first set then I’ll work on these but I also be having ideas too and I don’t wanna forget them that’s why it takes me a while to finish certain bots and especially if it’s a big bot)

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:
